mapper.select:
SELECT VOCM.GATE_CD , VOCM.VC_NO , VOCM.COMPANY_CD , VOCM.SUBJECT , VOCM.VOC_TYPE ,GETCOMCODE(VOCM.GATE_CD, 'MP053', VOCM.VOC_TYPE, 0, #{ses.langCd}) AS VOC_TYPE_NM , VOCM.PROGRESS_CD ,GETCOMCODE(VOCM.GATE_CD, 'MP052', VOCM.PROGRESS_CD, 0, #{ses.langCd}) AS PROGRESS_NM , VOCM.REQ_USER_ID ,GETUSERNAME(VOCM.GATE_CD, VOCM.REQ_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS REQ_USER_NM ,GETUSERINFO(VOCM.GATE_CD, VOCM.REQ_USER_ID, 'USER_TYPE') AS REQ_USER_TYPE , VOCM.REQ_COM_CD ,GETCOMPANYNAME(VOCM.GATE_CD, VOCM.REQ_COM_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS REQ_COM_NM ,(VOCM.REQ_DATE , 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS REQ_DATE ,(VOCM.PH_DATE , 'yyyy-MM-dd') AS PH_DATE ,(VOCM.RECV_DATE , 'yyyy-MM-dd') AS RECV_DATE ,(VOCM.CD_DATE , 'yyyy-MM-dd') AS CD_DATE ,(VOCM.DS_DATE , 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS DS_DATE , VOCM.DS_USER_ID ,getUserName(VOCM.GATE_CD, VOCM.DS_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS DS_USER_NM ,GETUSERINFO(VOCM.GATE_CD, VOCM.DS_USER_ID, 'USER_TYPE') AS DS_USER_TYPE , VOCM.ORDER_NO , VOCM.ITEM_CD , VOCM.RUB_TYPE ,getComCode(VOCM.GATE_CD, 'MP054', VOCM.RUB_TYPE, 0, #{ses.langCd}) AS RUB_TYPE_NM , VOCM.VOC_OBJ , VOCM.VOC_OBJ_SUP_CD ,(CASE WHEN VOCM.VOC_OBJ = 'USNI' THEN GETCOMPANYNAME(VOCM.GATE_CD, #{ses.manageCd}, #{ses.langCd}) WHEN VOCM.VOC_OBJ = 'USNE' THEN GETCOMPANYNAME(VOCM.GATE_CD, VOCM.VOC_OBJ_SUP_CD, #{ses.langCd}) WHEN VOCM.VOC_OBJ = 'USNC' THEN GETCOMPANYNAME(VOCM.GATE_CD, VOCM.VOC_OBJ_SUP_CD, #{ses.langCd}) ELSE '' END)
(CASE WHEN VOCM.VOC_OBJ_DEPT_CD IS NULL THEN '' ELSE ' ' (SELECT DEPT_NM FROM STOCOGDP WHERE GATE_CD = VOCM.GATE_CD AND BUYER_CD = VOCM.VOC_OBJ_SUP_CD AND DEPT_CD = VOCM.VOC_OBJ_DEPT_CD) END) AS VOC_OBJ_NM FROM STOCVOCM VOCM WHERE VOCM.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND VOCM.VIEW_TYPE = 'VOC' AND ((VOCM.REQ_COM_CD = #{ses.companyCd}) -- 작성업체 OR (VOCM.VOC_OBJ_SUP_CD = #{ses.companyCd} AND (VOCM.VOC_OBJ_DEPT_CD IS NULL OR VOCM.VOC_OBJ_DEPT_CD = #{ses.deptCd}) AND TO_NUMBER(VOCM.PROGRESS_CD) > 100) -- 대상고객사, 작성중(100) 제외 ) AND VOCM.DEL_FLAG = '0'
AND VOCM.REQ_DATE >= (#{START_DATE}) AND VOCM.REQ_DATE <= (#{END_DATE})
AND VOCM.PROGRESS_CD = #{PROGRESS_CD}
AND UPPER(GETUSERNAME(VOCM.GATE_CD, VOCM.REQ_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd})) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{REQ_USER_NM}) '%'
AND UPPER(VOCM.VOC_OBJ_SUP_CD) LIKE '%' #{VOC_OBJ_SUP_CD} '%'
AND UPPER(GETCOMPANYNAME(VOCM.GATE_CD,(VOCM.VOC_OBJ_SUP_CD, #{ses.manageCd}), #{ses.langCd})) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{VOC_OBJ_SUP_NM}) '%'
AND VOCM.VOC_TYPE = #{VOC_TYPE}
AND UPPER(GETUSERNAME(VOCM.GATE_CD, VOCM.DS_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd})) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{DS_USER_NM}) '%'
AND VOCM.REQ_USER_ID = #{REQ_USER_ID}
AND VOCM.SUBJECT LIKE '%' UPPER(#{SUBJECT}) '%'
AND VOCM.REQ_RMK LIKE '%' UPPER(#{REQ_RMK}) '%'
ORDER BY VOCM.VC_NO DESC

SELECT VOCM.VC_NO , VOCM.COMPANY_CD , VOCM.REQ_COM_CD ,GETCOMPANYNAME(VOCM.GATE_CD, VOCM.REQ_COM_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS REQ_COM_NM , VOCM.REQ_USER_ID ,GETUSERNAME(VOCM.GATE_CD, VOCM.REQ_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS REQ_USER_NM ,(VOCM.REQ_DATE , 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS REQ_DATE , CVUR.DEPT_CD , CVUR.DEPT_NM , VOCM.VOC_TYPE ,GETCOMCODE(VOCM.GATE_CD, 'MP053', VOCM.VOC_TYPE, 0, #{ses.langCd}) AS VOC_TYPE_NM ,(VOCM.PH_DATE , 'yyyy-MM-dd') AS PH_DATE , VOCM.VOC_OBJ , VOCM.VOC_OBJ_SUP_CD ,GETCOMPANYNAME(VOCM.GATE_CD, VOCM.VOC_OBJ_SUP_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS VOC_OBJ_SUP_NM , VOCM.VOC_OBJ_DEPT_CD ,GETDEPTNAME(VOCM.GATE_CD, VOCM.VOC_OBJ_SUP_CD, VOCM.VOC_OBJ_DEPT_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS VOC_OBJ_DEPT_NM , VOCM.ORDER_NO , VOCM.ITEM_CD , VOCM.SUBJECT , VOCM.REQ_RMK , VOCM.ATTACH_FILE_NO ,(VOCM.RECV_DATE , 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS RECV_DATE , VOCM.PROGRESS_CD , VOCM.PROGRESS_CD AS ORG_PROGRESS_CD ,GETCOMCODE(VOCM.GATE_CD, 'MP052', VOCM.PROGRESS_CD, 0, #{ses.langCd}) AS PROGRESS_NM , VOCM.DS_USER_ID ,GETUSERNAME(VOCM.GATE_CD, VOCM.DS_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS DS_USER_NM ,(VOCM.CD_DATE , 'yyyy-MM-dd') AS CD_DATE ,(VOCM.DS_DATE , 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS DS_DATE , VOCM.RUB_TYPE , VOCM.DF_RMK , VOCM.DS_ATTACH_FILE_NO FROM STOCVOCM VOCM LEFT JOIN STOCCVUR CVUR ON (CVUR.GATE_CD = VOCM.GATE_CD AND CVUR.USER_ID = VOCM.REQ_USER_ID) WHERE VOCM.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND VOCM.COMPANY_CD = #{COMPANY_CD} AND VOCM.VC_NO = #{VC_NO} AND VOCM.DEL_FLAG = '0'

SELECT CUST.IRS_NUM AS CORP_NO , CVUR.DEPT_CD AS BRC ,(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AS APLY_DT , CVUR.USER_ID AS USER_ID , 'SMS_VOC_CMPL' '@@' CVUR.GATE_CD '@@' #{VC_NO} AS CONT_TBL_PK , NULL AS FILE_SIZE FROM STOCCVUR CVUR JOIN STOCCUST CUST ON (CVUR.GATE_CD = CUST.GATE_CD AND CVUR.COMPANY_CD = CUST.CUST_CD) WHERE CVUR.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND CVUR.USER_ID = #{ses.userId}

SELECT BACP.CTRL_USER_ID ,CVUR.USER_NM AS CTRL_USER_NM ,CVUR.EMAIL AS USER_EMAIL ,CVUR.CELL_NUM AS USER_CELL_NUM
, '1' AS MAIL_FLAG , '1' AS SMS_FLAG
,(CVUR.MAIL_FLAG, '0') AS MAIL_FLAG ,(CVUR.SMS_FLAG, '0') AS SMS_FLAG
, #{VOC_TYPE} AS VOC_TYPE ,GETCODENAME(BACP.GATE_CD, 'MP053', #{VOC_TYPE}, #{ses.langCd}) AS VOC_TYPE_NM -- 2021.07.13 : 고객사에서 VOC요청 완료 후 SMS 수수료 부과 ,(SELECT IRS_NUM FROM STOCCUST WHERE GATE_CD = BACP.GATE_CD AND CUST_CD = #{ses.companyCd}) AS CORP_NO ,(SELECT DEPT_CD FROM STOCCVUR WHERE GATE_CD = BACP.GATE_CD AND USER_ID = #{ses.userId}) AS BRC ,(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AS APLY_DT , #{ses.userId} AS USER_ID , 'SMS_VOC_REQ' '@@' BACP.GATE_CD '@@' #{VC_NO} AS CONT_TBL_PK , NULL AS FILE_SIZE FROM STOCBACP BACP
JOIN STOCUSER CVUR ON (CVUR.GATE_CD = BACP.GATE_CD AND CVUR.COMPANY_CD = BACP.BUYER_CD AND CVUR.USER_ID = BACP.CTRL_USER_ID AND CVUR.DEL_FLAG = '0')
JOIN STOCCVUR CVUR ON (CVUR.GATE_CD = BACP.GATE_CD AND CVUR.COMPANY_CD = BACP.BUYER_CD AND CVUR.USER_ID = BACP.CTRL_USER_ID AND CVUR.DEL_FLAG = '0')
WHERE BACP.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND BACP.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND BACP.CTRL_CD = #{CTRL_CD} -- 고객사:BR100, 협력회사:SR020, 운영사:AR030
AND CVUR.DEPT_CD = #{DEPT_CD}
AND BACP.USE_FLAG = '1' AND BACP.DEL_FLAG = '0'

SELECT VOCM.GATE_CD , VOCM.VC_NO , VOCD.VC_SQ , VOCM.COMPANY_CD , VOCM.SUBJECT , VOCM.VOC_TYPE ,GETCOMCODE(VOCM.GATE_CD, 'NH0045', VOCM.VOC_TYPE, 0, #{ses.langCd}) AS VOC_TYPE_NM ,(CASE WHEN VOCD.PROGRESS_CD IS NULL THEN VOCM.PROGRESS_CD ELSE VOCD.PROGRESS_CD END) AS PROGRESS_CD ,GETCOMCODE(VOCM.GATE_CD, 'NH0044', (CASE WHEN VOCD.PROGRESS_CD IS NULL THEN VOCM.PROGRESS_CD ELSE VOCD.PROGRESS_CD END), 0, #{ses.langCd}) AS PROGRESS_NM ,((SELECT MAX(PROGRESS_CD) FROM STOCVOCD WHERE GATE_CD = VOCM.GATE_CD AND VC_NO = VOCM.VC_NO AND COMPANY_CD = VOCM.COMPANY_CD), VOCM.PROGRESS_CD) AS MAX_PROGRESS_CD , VOCM.REQ_USER_ID ,GETUSERNAME(VOCM.GATE_CD, VOCM.REQ_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS REQ_USER_NM ,GETUSERINFO(VOCM.GATE_CD, VOCM.REQ_USER_ID, 'USER_TYPE') AS REQ_USER_TYPE , VOCM.REQ_COM_CD ,GETCOMPANYNAME(VOCM.GATE_CD, VOCM.REQ_COM_CD, #{ses.langCd}) ' ' (SELECT DEPT_NM FROM STOCOGDP WHERE GATE_CD = VOCM.GATE_CD AND BUYER_CD = VOCM.REQ_COM_CD AND DEPT_CD = VOCM.REQ_DEPT_CD) AS REQ_COM_NM , VOCM.REQ_DEPT_CD ,(VOCM.REQ_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS REQ_DATE -- 요청일시 ,(VOCM.PH_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-dd') AS PH_DATE -- 답변요청일자 ,(VOCD.RECV_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-dd') AS RECV_DATE -- 접수일자 ,(VOCM.CD_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-dd') AS CD_DATE -- 답변예정일자 ,(VOCD.CONF_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS DS_DATE -- 답변일시 , VOCD.CONF_USER_ID AS DS_USER_ID ,getUserName(VOCD.GATE_CD, VOCD.CONF_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS DS_USER_NM ,GETUSERINFO(VOCD.GATE_CD, VOCD.CONF_USER_ID, 'USER_TYPE') AS DS_USER_TYPE , VOCD.BUYER_CD AS VOC_OBJ_SUP_CD , VOCD.DEPT_CD AS VOC_OBJ_DEPT_CD ,(SELECT A.CUST_NM FROM STOCCUST A WHERE A.GATE_CD = VOCD.GATE_CD AND A.CUST_CD = VOCD.BUYER_CD)
(CASE WHEN VOCD.DEPT_CD IS NULL THEN '' ELSE ' ' (SELECT DEPT_NM FROM STOCOGDP WHERE GATE_CD = VOCD.GATE_CD AND BUYER_CD = VOCD.BUYER_CD AND DEPT_CD = VOCD.DEPT_CD) END) AS VOC_OBJ_SUP_NM FROM STOCVOCM VOCM JOIN STOCVOCD VOCD ON (VOCM.GATE_CD = VOCD.GATE_CD AND VOCM.VC_NO = VOCD.VC_NO AND VOCM.COMPANY_CD = VOCD.COMPANY_CD) JOIN STOCCVUR CVUR ON (CVUR.GATE_CD = VOCM.GATE_CD AND CVUR.USER_ID = VOCM.REQ_USER_ID) WHERE VOCM.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND VOCM.VIEW_TYPE = 'BCT' AND ((VOCM.REQ_COM_CD = #{ses.companyCd} AND CVUR.DEPT_CD = #{ses.deptCd}) OR VOCM.REQ_DEPT_CD= #{ses.deptCd} -- 작성고객사, 부서) OR (VOCD.BUYER_CD = #{ses.companyCd} AND (VOCD.DEPT_CD IS NULL OR VOCD.DEPT_CD = #{ses.deptCd}) AND TO_NUMBER(VOCM.PROGRESS_CD) > 100) -- 대상고객사, 작성중(100) 제외 ) AND VOCM.DEL_FLAG = '0'
AND VOCM.REQ_DATE >= (#{START_DATE}) AND VOCM.REQ_DATE <= (#{END_DATE})
AND VOCD.PROGRESS_CD = #{PROGRESS_CD}
AND VOCM.VOC_TYPE = #{VOC_TYPE}
AND VOCM.SUBJECT LIKE '%' UPPER(#{SUBJECT}) '%'
AND VOCM.REQ_USER_ID = #{REQ_USER_ID}
AND UPPER(GETUSERNAME(VOCM.GATE_CD, VOCM.REQ_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd})) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{REQ_USER_NM}) '%'
AND UPPER(VOCD.BUYER_CD) LIKE '%' #{VOC_OBJ_SUP_CD} '%'
AND UPPER(GETCOMPANYNAME(VOCD.GATE_CD,(VOCM.BUYER_CD, #{ses.manageCd}), #{ses.langCd})) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{VOC_OBJ_SUP_NM}) '%'
AND UPPER(GETUSERNAME(VOCD.GATE_CD, VOCD.CONF_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd})) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{DS_USER_NM}) '%'
AND VOCM.PH_DATE IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY VOCM.VC_NO DESC, VOCD.VC_SQ

SELECT VOCM.VC_NO , VOCM.COMPANY_CD , VOCM.SUBJECT , VOCM.REQ_COM_CD ,GETCOMPANYNAME(VOCM.GATE_CD, VOCM.REQ_COM_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS REQ_COM_NM , VOCM.REQ_USER_ID ,GETUSERNAME(VOCM.GATE_CD, VOCM.REQ_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS REQ_USER_NM ,(VOCM.REQ_DATE , 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS REQ_DATE , VOCM.REQ_DEPT_CD ,(SELECT DEPT_NM FROM STOCOGDP WHERE GATE_CD = VOCM.GATE_CD AND BUYER_CD = VOCM.REQ_COM_CD AND DEPT_CD = VOCM.REQ_DEPT_CD) AS DEPT_NM , VOCM.VOC_TYPE ,GETCOMCODE(VOCM.GATE_CD, 'NH0045', VOCM.VOC_TYPE, 0, #{ses.langCd}) AS VOC_TYPE_NM ,(CASE WHEN VOCM.PH_DATE IS NOT NULL THEN '1' ELSE '0' END) AS PH_FLAG -- 회신여부 ,(VOCM.PH_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS PH_DATE -- 회신요청일 , VOCM.REQ_RMK , VOCM.ATTACH_FILE_NO
, VOCD.VC_SQ , VOCD.BUYER_CD AS VOC_OBJ_SUP_CD ,GETCOMPANYNAME(VOCD.GATE_CD, VOCD.BUYER_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS VOC_OBJ_SUP_NM ,(VOCD.RECV_DATE , 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS RECV_DATE , VOCD.RECV_USER_ID ,GETUSERNAME(VOCD.GATE_CD, VOCD.RECV_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS RECV_USER_NM , VOCD.CONF_USER_ID AS DS_USER_ID ,GETUSERNAME(VOCD.GATE_CD, VOCD.CONF_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS DS_USER_NM ,(VOCD.CONF_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS DS_DATE , VOCD.CONF_RMKS AS DF_RMK , VOCD.ATTACH_FILE_NO AS DS_ATTACH_FILE_NO , VOCM.VIEW_TYPE
,(VOCD.PROGRESS_CD, '200') AS PROGRESS_CD ,(VOCD.PROGRESS_CD, '200') AS ORG_PROGRESS_CD
,(VOCM.PROGRESS_CD, '100') AS PROGRESS_CD ,(VOCM.PROGRESS_CD, '100') AS ORG_PROGRESS_CD
FROM STOCVOCM VOCM
JOIN STOCVOCD VOCD ON (VOCM.GATE_CD = VOCD.GATE_CD AND VOCM.VC_NO = VOCD.VC_NO AND VOCM.COMPANY_CD = VOCD.COMPANY_CD)
LEFT JOIN STOCCVUR CVUR ON (CVUR.GATE_CD = VOCM.GATE_CD AND CVUR.USER_ID = VOCM.REQ_USER_ID) WHERE VOCM.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND VOCM.VC_NO = #{VC_NO}
AND VOCD.VC_SQ = #{VC_SQ}
AND VOCM.DEL_FLAG = '0'

SELECT VOCD.VC_NO , VOCD.BUYER_CD , CUST.CUST_NM AS BUYER_NM , CUST.IRS_NUM , VOCD.DEPT_CD ,(SELECT DEPT_NM FROM STOCOGDP WHERE GATE_CD = VOCD.GATE_CD AND BUYER_CD = VOCD.BUYER_CD AND DEPT_CD = VOCD.DEPT_CD) AS DEPT_NM FROM STOCVOCD VOCD JOIN STOCCUST CUST ON (VOCD.GATE_CD = CUST.GATE_CD AND VOCD.BUYER_CD = CUST.CUST_CD) WHERE VOCD.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND VOCD.VC_NO = #{VC_NO}
AND VOCD.VC_SQ = #{VC_SQ}
